description: This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Base diameter: 12 cmPotli-style purse with a drawstring closurePadded silk upperFabric innerTassels on the drawstringsCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
